user.title: Connect to Elegant LED Controller
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Elegant LED controller.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller. Check the IP address and ensure the device is powered on.

data_description.time_sync_enabled: Sync controller clock when it drifts from HA.
data_description.time_sync_threshold: Maximum allowed time drift before syncing (2–60 s).
data_description.poll_enabled: Periodically fetch full state from the controller as a safety net.
data_description.poll_interval: How often to fetch full state (60–86400 s).
data_description.debounce_enabled: After detecting an external change (browser, remote), fetch full state to catch multi-zone changes.
data_description.external_change_debounce: Wait this long after the last external change before fetching (0.1–10.0 s).
